description_long: This object is a long, straight-bladed sword with a sharply pointed tip and a double-edged blade, rendered in a deep black color. The blade is geometric and tapers evenly to a fine point, suggesting it is designed for thrusting as well as cutting. The hilt features a gold-colored crossguard with a subtle curve, providing hand protection and a visual accent. The handle is cylindrical, ribbed for grip, and primarily black with gold accents at the pommel and guard, giving it a regal and functional appearance. The pommel is rounded and capped with a gold detail, adding balance and a touch of ornamentation. The overall design is sleek and minimalistic, with a focus on functionality and a hint of decorative flair.
description: A sleek, black double-edged sword with a pointed blade, gold-accented crossguard, and ribbed handle. The design is both functional and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the black blade, gold crossguard, and ribbed handle with gold pommel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and the cylindrical handle, with minimal width visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle details from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slimness of the blade and the handle's profile.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, ribbed, black with gold accents, rounded pommel
attribute_ornamentation: gold accents on guard and pommel
